english translation text:
Ziyarat Sayyida
Zainab Al Kubra (AS)
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يـا بِنْتَ رَسُولِ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O daughter of the messenger of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يـَا بِنْتَ نَبِىِّ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O daughter of the Prophet of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يـَا بِنْتَمُحَمَّدٍنِ المُصْطَفَى
english translation text: Peace be on you, O daughter of Muhammad Al-Mustafa

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِيـَا بِنْتَ وَلِىِّ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be with you, O daughter of the wali of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يـَا بِنْتَ عَلِىِّنِ الْمَرْتِضَئ
english translation text: Peace be with you, O daughter of Ali al-Murtadha,
the master of the vicegerents and the truthful ones

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يـَا بِنْتَ فَاطِمَةَ الزَّهْرَا ءِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O daughter of Fatima tuz Zahra,
leader of the women of the world

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يـَا  اُخْتَ الْحَسَنِ وَالْحُسَيْنِ
english translation text: Peace be on you O sister of Hasan and Husayn,

arabic text: سَيِّدَةِ ىْ شَبَابِ اَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ
english translation text: the leaders of the youth of the dwellers of paradise
Peace be on you, O pure lady
Peace be on you, O one called welcomingly (unto Allah)
Peace be on you, O one who is pure and pious
Peace on you, O one who is pleased (with Allah) and is pleased (in the sight of Allah)

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ اَيَّتُهَا الْعَالِمَةُ الْغَيْرُ الْمُعَلَّمَةِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O one who is a scholar who has not been taught

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ اَيَّتُهَا الْفَهِيْمَةُ الْغَيْرُ الْمُفَهَّمَةِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O one who understands without being made to understand
Peace be on you, O one who is oppressed
Peace be on you, O one who is grieved
Peace be on you, O one who is truthful
Peace be on you, O one who is afflicted (with calamities)
Peace be with you, O one who was made a captive

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ اَيَّتُهَا الصَّاحِبَةُ الْمُصِيْبَةُ الْعُظْمى
english translation text: Peace be on you, O one who is the bearer of the greatest tragedy
Peace be on you, O Zainab al-Kubra
May the mercy and blessing of Allah be with you.
